name: Caffeine
description: This is a test visualization utilizing standard chemfig LaTeX syntax to verify the server-side rendering pipeline.
explanation:
### Chemfig Test
This tests the basic caffeine structure drawing across linked rings in `chemfig`.

- **C8H10N4O2**: Shows proper placement of double bonds, nitrogen heteroatoms, internal bonds, and methyl groups.

Rendering this successfully confirms the DVI-to-SVG backend is properly compiling the generated molecular document.
